items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower Initiative
items.description: Revenue Operations Control Tower Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Net New Revenue Attainment and Annual Platform Value Realized, anchored in automation, support deflection, and better operating transparency without creating shadow workflows and led through Unified revenue data model. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net new revenue attainment by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase pipeline quality by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Unified revenue data model with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Integration adapters and migration toolkit with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Rules-based routing engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Propensity and deal scoring with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace.
Introduced workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.
Introduced workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Revenue Operations Control Tower: operating discovery

items.title: Demand Engine Control Tower
items.description: Demand Engine Control Tower exists to Reduce handoff and attribution noise in the demand engine so marketing can create more qualified pipeline without scaling manual ops work. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase return on investment by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase marketing roi by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase expansion by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase channel expansion rate by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Stage-gated workflow orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Cross-functional approval workspace with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Forecasting and scenario planning with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Pipeline risk intelligence with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Web Workspace.
Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Mobile App.
Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Dashboard.
